warnings: The browser collector covers Chromium-family forensic copies, not Firefox or Safari.
A clean scanner result is inconclusive unless dependency, deployment, browser, and network evidence scopes are complete.
reviewer_summary: The post gives an under-five-minute decision path, separates exposure classes, preserves evidence before cleanup, provides two tested collectors with 0/1/2 semantics, and defines containment/eradication/recovery/closure gates.
